{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032303314062054623816FD0999568"}"},"total":89},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7594535827281134361","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看完现有章节其实还行没有评论区说的那么差，虽然主角修炼的确实晚但也没吃什么鳖。
半个普通人靠知道剧情这一点来阴僵尸在普遍开局半无敌的九叔文里还是有点新颖的。
对原著人物的性格刻画很到位有些细节，总得来说在番茄也算得上是中上的九叔文了。牢作一定要写下去啊","text_exts":[{"e":45,"s":42,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774207900D0999568%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227594535827281134361%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227574805034622274585%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768246990,"group_id":"7574805034622274585","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"待续","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8StM8jOIH3ZTerl35I/IvM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8b9dd5eea5fd4c4cae191349d1414e4c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789916&x-signature=VMK5gA9xbCbD0S6bTPlyS0mL7lw%3D","user_id":"100793266227726","user_name":"想撬水门墙角的富岳"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"100793266227726","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7574805034622274585","book_info":{"abstract":"【九叔僵尸电影宇宙+系统+搞笑】
00后社畜李威一觉醒来，发现自己竟穿到了九叔僵尸电影宇宙！
荒村藏厉鬼，野岭蹦僵尸，连走夜路都得揣着糯米保狗命，这开局简直是地狱难度！
 
别人穿越是左拥右抱装逼耍帅，他倒好，每天睁眼就得琢磨怎么在妖魔鬼怪的牙缝里苟活。就在李威仰天抹眼泪，怀疑人生是不是开了倍速虐他时，他脑海里突然炸响一声提示：
 
【叮！功德无量系统已上线，斩妖除魔可赚功德点，兑换法器、功法、寿命……】
 
李威瞬间变脸，抱着系统大腿哭嚎：“系统爸爸！您可算来了！这破世界的僵尸精怪，等着小爷我来制裁你们吧！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4f1d5db236000f381e434caf5d32ed63","author":"孔武有力","author_id":"","book_id":"7574805034622274585","book_name":"僵尸世界：我是你们队长阿威啊！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":383,"name":"九叔","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=383&name=九叔&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1455,"name":"风水秘术","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1455&name=风水秘术&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7574805389829489177","read_count":"15269","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"629562"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.2","serial_count":"198","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,系统,穿越,灵异,九叔,风水秘术","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4297f135b921e9d6b7e9e2b11a0fc865~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779391900&x-signature=%2FhzttisP95D4ygM05ENaVnjandQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"606530045219309","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"128"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032303314062054623816FD0999568"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5957,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":3244},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1768274704,"author_reply_time":1768274740,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7593780476868444990","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作为一个番茄阅读时长超过5000小时的老书虫，且极少打评分的人，我来客观的评论一下这本小说吧！
首先，我个人是很喜欢这本小说的，因为我喜欢僵尸电影这种题材，而这本小说非常符合我的期待，毕竟龙傲天类型的我已经早就看腻了。
其次，这本小说的剧情连贯性非常好，完全感觉不到有脱节的感觉，而且故事情节描写得也很到位，人物描写也很生动，文笔方面没有问题。
最后，希望作者一定要坚持下去，因为我很期待支线剧情结束后，这本小说会不会给我带来更大的惊喜！
祝小力新书爆火，我会一直支持你的！不要理会那些只会用差评来发泄情绪的死黑子们。","text_exts":[{"e":97,"s":94,"text":"龙傲天","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%BE%99%E5%82%B2%E5%A4%A9&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774207900D0999568%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227593780476868444990%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227574805034622274585%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%BE%99%E5%82%B2%E5%A4%A9%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768068043,"group_id":"7574805034622274585","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"浪里小白龙","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3bZifX67tob1+rpgvPPyfMlw86nFTo/Uaaff+1ZVm4Y","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787248&x-signature=NtetCP%2BD2YPkYr6bl%2BJMa04hBGU%3D","user_id":"1947942379857383","user_name":"一声卧槽行天下~"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1947942379857383","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7574805034622274585","book_info":{"abstract":"【九叔僵尸电影宇宙+系统+搞笑】
